description_long: This apartment building is a multi-story structure with a modern, rectilinear design, featuring a mix of light pink and white exterior walls. The building includes several balconies with glass or metal railings, large windows arranged in horizontal bands, and a flat roof with rooftop amenities such as terraces and possibly garden spaces. A prominent black-roofed annex extends from one side, likely serving as a garage or auxiliary facility. The main entrance is set back beneath a covered area, flanked by palm trees and a paved walkway. The overall layout is asymmetrical, with varied window sizes and placements, and the building is surrounded by minimal landscaping including a few trees.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with pink and white facades, large windows, balconies, and a flat roof, featuring a black-roofed annex and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balconies, palm trees, and the black-roofed annex to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black-roofed annex, side balconies, and the building's layered structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, rooftop features, and a more solid wall with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Side view with prominent balconies, large windows, and a tree in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in horizontal bands with some vertical groupings, creating a semi-symmetrical but varied pattern across the facade. The spacing and size of windows differ between floors and sections, contributing to a modern, dynamic appearance.
